votes.reason: The Python code correctly implements the FibFib sequence using an efficient iterative approach, which matches the recursive definition in the Coq specification.
The Python code correctly implements the fibfib sequence using an iterative approach, matching the recursive Coq definition, and the pre/spec functions match exactly.
The Python code correctly implements the fibfib sequence using an efficient iterative approach, and the pre/spec functions match the Coq definitions.

The Python code implements the same fibfib recurrence as the Coq code: fibfib(0)=0, fibfib(1)=0, fibfib(2)=1, and fibfib(n)=fibfib(n-1)+fibfib(n-2)+fibfib(n-3) for n>=3. The Python uses an iterative approach for efficiency but computes the same values. The precondition returns True (matching Coq's True), and the spec checks res == fibfib(n), matching the Coq specification.
